scope_note: QA-KG Authority Ranker Cert [254] v1: Phase 4 authority-tiered retrieval ranker. Primary source: docs/specs/QA_MEM_SCOPE.md (Dale, 2026); ranker_spec.json (Dale, 2026); qa_kg_epistemic_fields_cert_v1/allowed_matrix.json (Dale, 2026). Validates `tools/qa_kg/kg.py::KG.search_authority_ranked` against the formula spec at `ranker_spec.json` and the 20-query benchmark at `query_fixture.json`. Single source of truth for formula constants is `ranker_spec.json` (loaded by both the ranker and the validator). Closed sets `decay_exempt_status ∪ decay_status` (R9) and `authority_weight.keys()` (R9) MUST cover the schema enums + `qa_kg_epistemic_fields_cert_v1/allowed_matrix.json`. Gates: (R1, HARD) `min_authority='internal'` excludes `authority='agent'`; (R2, HARD) per-fixture `expected_top_1_authority` matches `results[0].authority`; (R3, HARD or N-A) for fixture queries tagged `contradicted_material`, every contradicting node appears in top-3 with `contradiction_state != 'none'` — N-A when zero such queries are runnable; (R4, HARD or N-A) tri-state — N-A when no node carries `valid_until != ''`, PASS when at least one populated AND filter excludes correctly; (R5, WARN) recall@5 vs A-RAG `retrieve_keyword` baseline within ±10%; (R6, HARD) formula correctness — `compose_score` returns spec'd score within 1e-6 across ≥6 golden cases; (R7, HARD) determinism — 5× re-run yields identical RankedHit lists under fixed valid_at; (R8, HARD) no `except Exception: pass` / bare `except: pass` swallows in `tools/qa_kg/ranker.py` or `KG.search_authority_ranked` — AST scan; (R9, HARD) coverage completeness on BOTH axes against `qa_kg_epistemic_fields_cert_v1/allowed_matrix.json` — decay_exempt_status ∪ decay_status == EPISTEMIC_STATUSES, authority_weight.keys() == AUTHORITIES, lifecycle_factor.keys() == LIFECYCLE_STATES \ {withdrawn}, decay sets disjoint.
